name: tfg-fabian-gonzalez-lence-monorepo
description: Monorepo for TFG projects - Railway should use Root Directory: projects/4-CartographicProjectManager/backend

scripts.railway:build: cd projects/4-CartographicProjectManager/backend && npm ci && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.railway:start: cd projects/4-CartographicProjectManager/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm start
